summary: No sensitive data leaks found in SKILL.md. All internal IPs (95.217.227.164, 62.109.14.209), ports (8094, 8091, 8095), internal paths (/root/), credentials, API endpoints (/api/auth, /api/data, /api/fetch), and platform-specific identifiers (d{USERID}, OWNER_ADDRESS, dashboard_jwt) have been removed.
